title: centaurium umbellatum subsp. bifrons
intro: Centaurium umbellatum subsp. bifrons, also known as lesser centaury or mountain bluet, is a perennial plant in the gentian family, native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of iridoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Centaurium umbellatum subsp. bifrons include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Centaurium umbellatum subsp. bifrons is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
